OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Gerhard Neuhaus is present.
Attorney, Steven Williams, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, Anthony Barnett and Lucas Lanell , are present.
Attorney, Jerome Schweich, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
This case did NOT settle.
The trial date of APR-26-2010 remains on calendar.
